Section One · National Press

203 Spring Creek, in front of the right audience.

The home is now live on Mansion Global's luxury listings network, syndicating into four of the most-read financial and lifestyle publications in the country — the rooms readers go to when they're house-hunting at this tier.

Featured Placement
WSJ Real Estate

The Wall Street Journal's real estate vertical — read by senior executives and high-net-worth households.

Featured Placement
Mansion Global

Dow Jones' dedicated luxury real estate platform and the syndication source for this network.

Featured Placement
Barron's

The investor-class weekly — its luxury listings module surfaces the property to a financial readership.

Featured Placement
MarketWatch

Personal-finance audience overlap — out-of-market buyers researching relocation often land here first.

Also Underway

A James Edition placement is in motion, and we've asked Redfin Premier whether we can pull viewership analytics from these publications.

James Edition — the global luxury marketplace used by international and ultra-high-net-worth buyers — is the fifth target on our press list. Separately, we've written to the Premier alias requesting view-count visibility across WSJ, Mansion Global, Barron's, and MarketWatch. We'll surface those numbers in this report the moment they're returned.

Section Two · Broker Network

Three concentric rings of broker outreach.

Press is the front door. The deal almost always comes through a broker who already has a buyer in mind. That's where the bulk of our energy has gone.

Tier A · Matched Buyers Sent · 5/12/2026

Brokers whose buyers' saved searches matched this home.

FlexMLS's Reverse Prospect report flagged 94 active brokers whose buyers had saved searches matching Spring Creek's criteria. Each one received a peer-to-peer, fact-led email from Jonas — no consumer-marketing language, no superlatives — inviting a private showing, with the Matterport 3D tour linked twice for both scan-readers and read-through readers.

Goal: convert the strongest matches into booked private showings before broker open day.

94
Brokers Reached
Highest-intent ring
Tier B · Luxury Producers Final list · 207 agents

Every Albuquerque agent working the luxury tier.

We built a 207-agent cold luxury list — agents with $1M+ ABQ production in the last 12 months, plus 25 net-new submarket specialists surfaced through our own analysis of 1,196 closed sales across Far NE Heights, North ABQ Acres, Sandia Heights, and Foothills North (Nov 2024–May 2026).

Each agent gets a property-focused email anchored on the broker open and the option of a private showing — restrained-luxury voice, never consumer marketing.

207
Luxury Agents Engaged
Plus 25 specialists a standard pull would have missed
Tier C · Feeder Markets In progress · with Courtney

Redfin agents in the cities that send buyers to ABQ.

The next ring out: bespoke 1:1 outreach to Redfin luxury agents in Denver, Boulder, Scottsdale, Bend, Boise, Austin, and Santa Monica — the feeder markets where high-net-worth retirees and tech-sector relocators bound for Albuquerque actually live today.

We're coordinating that list with Courtney on the Redfin team this week.

7
Feeder Cities Targeted
Launching next
Why this matters

The single biggest tactical innovation on this listing has been pairing a standard $1M+ luxury list with a custom-built submarket specialist list pulled from 18 months of closed sales.

A one-filter pull would have missed agents who quietly own the Sandia Heights / La Cueva High School corridor without showing up in the top luxury rankings. Our analysis closed those gaps — 25 net-new specialists added to the cold-luxury send list.

1,196
Closed Sales Reviewed
806
Agents Profiled & Tiered
+25
Net-New Submarket Adds
4
NE Submarkets Analyzed
301+
Brokers reached so far

So far, we've gotten the word out to over three hundred brokers — and we're not done.

Tier A (94) and Tier B (207) are out the door. Tier C feeder-market outreach lands next, with a fresh push at the broker open and again after the price improvement. Each pass widens the funnel without losing the peer-to-peer voice that gets these emails read.

We'll continue reporting cumulative reach week-over-week.

On track
Section Four · The Next Ten Days

Two milestones, back to back.

Coordinated to keep momentum building straight through the broker open.

Friday · May 15, 2026

Price improvement.

Calibrated, signal-strong adjustment — handled in restrained-luxury voice, as a credibility signal to buyers' agents, never as a discount headline. Triggers a second outreach pass across Tier A and Tier B with the new number.

T-minus 0 days
Thursday · May 28, 2026

Broker open.

Working broker preview — the primary CTA in every cold-luxury email, structured so any luxury agent can walk the home and get a read for their client base. Catered, listing-agent accompanied, Matterport queued on the screens.

T-minus 13 days
A Recommended Resource

A specialist worth speaking with on the tax side.

Real-estate-savvy CPAs can often structure losses on a property sale to meaningfully offset other income. We'd recommend a conversation with Tamara Beall at REDW — she's a Tax Principal with deep real-estate experience and works with owners in exactly this situation.
